title: onobrychis conferta subsp. hispanica
intro: Onobrychis conferta subsp. hispanica is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), known for its medicinal and herbal properties. It is commonly used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as bloating, cramps, and diarrhea, as well as its potential to help manage weight and improve overall well-being. Onobrychis conferta subsp. hispanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate related symptoms.
